visa_types.name: Family Reunion
visa_types.documents_required:
Please click on below file to reach required documents checklist:
Family Reunion
visa_types.visa_fees: [aut > tur > en > Table:Family Reunion > Visa Fees 1]
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
 Turkish Citizens who will  reunification with their spouses should apply this visa type .
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
 Turkish Citizens who will  reunification with their spouses should apply this visa type .

## Visa Fees

[aut > tur > en > Table:Family Reunion > Visa Fees 1]

## Documents Required
Please click on below file to reach required documents checklist:
Family Reunion

## Photo Specifications
 Must be an up-to-date photograph (dated max 6 month old)
Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
Should be sized between 35 – 45 mm
Full face taken straight forward 35 mm from point of the chin to top of hair
Taken against a white background 
Without sunglasses 
Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons 
Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses 
The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes 
For further details with samples click here.
Please note that the Visa application Centre may not accept photographs that do not meet these 
                                     specifications. In case photos are not meeting the requirements mentioned above Submission Officer 
                                     might ask to provide updated / recent photos.

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Visa Application Form & Questionnaire
Please fill Visa Application forms completely and with correct information.
Visa Application Form
Attention Please:
Visa application forms need to be filled in with correct information and must be signed by the applicant himself.

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Long Term
visa_types.overview:
The long stay D visas are handled by the Consulate General of Austria in Turkey. Applications with Long Term visas can be 
                              submitted directly at the Consulate General (upon prior scheduled appointment). applicants who wish to apply via VFS Global offices must book online appointment for their visa application
Applicants will have to provide evidence that they fall under particular visa category. 
Please check on each of the visa categories for detailed information.
visa_types.full_text:
The long stay D visas are handled by the Consulate General of Austria in Turkey. Applications with Long Term visas can be 
                              submitted directly at the Consulate General (upon prior scheduled appointment). applicants who wish to apply via VFS Global offices must book online appointment for their visa application
Applicants will have to provide evidence that they fall under particular visa category. 
Please check on each of the visa categories for detailed information.

visa_types.name: Tourism
visa_types.documents_required:
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tur/en/aut/travel-insurance)
Dear Applicant;
The document list for your tourism category  visa application is provided by Austria Istanbul General Consulate.
Please click for the required documents.

Attention Please:

Below supporting documents has to be translated into German or English:
- Letter of employment
- Letter of absence
- Letter of Chamber of Commerce (HK)
- School/Student Certificate
- Sponsor Letter (If the financial sponsor don’t attend the appointment, letter should be notarized)
- Letter of Consent (Muvafakatname)
- Any personal letter of the applicant, all documents represented as written (letters, fair invitations, extra docs. Etc.)
- Population Record Sample (Nüfus Kayıt Örneği)
- The applicants are suggested to provide all the required documents at the time of their application for their Visa submission evaluation.
VFS Global has no effect about visa process result and does not advice or suggest to the applicants about their visa result.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[aut > tur > en > Table:Tourism > Visa Fees 1]
Attention Please :
- All payments are accepted only in Euro and in cash.
- All payments are non-refundable.
- Except from visa fee, there will be 22.34 Euro service fee charged for each applications.
- Courier is an optional service which will be charged 15 Euro.
- Credit Card is not valid for the payments.
Note:
Change is given back in Turkish Lira even if the fees are cashed in euros (Euros coins are not accepted).
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Tourist visa is only intended to allow a  foreign national to visit Austria for a limited period of time. This category  of visa caters to people wishing to visit Austria for touristic purposes either  through buying a tour via travel agency, or through self-bookings of tickets  and hotel.
          
            Applicants will have to provide evidence that  he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Tourist visa is only intended to allow a  foreign national to visit Austria for a limited period of time. This category  of visa caters to people wishing to visit Austria for touristic purposes either  through buying a tour via travel agency, or through self-bookings of tickets  and hotel.
          
            Applicants will have to provide evidence that  he/she falls under this category.

## Schengen Visa
The Schengen visa is only intended to allow a  foreign national to visit the Austria   and other Schengen countries for a limited period of time. If you wish  to reside in the Austria for an extended period of time (more than 90 days),  you need to apply for a long term visa directly at the Austria Embassy /  Consulate General in Turkey.

            Please click on each of the above tab for  detailed information.

## Visa Fees

[aut > tur > en > Table:Tourism > Visa Fees 1]
Attention Please :
- All payments are accepted only in Euro and in cash.
- All payments are non-refundable.
- Except from visa fee, there will be 22.34 Euro service fee charged for each applications.
- Courier is an optional service which will be charged 15 Euro.
- Credit Card is not valid for the payments.
Note:
Change is given back in Turkish Lira even if the fees are cashed in euros (Euros coins are not accepted).

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tur/en/aut/travel-insurance)
Dear Applicant;
The document list for your tourism category  visa application is provided by Austria Istanbul General Consulate.
Please click for the required documents.

Attention Please:

Below supporting documents has to be translated into German or English:
- Letter of employment
- Letter of absence
- Letter of Chamber of Commerce (HK)
- School/Student Certificate
- Sponsor Letter (If the financial sponsor don’t attend the appointment, letter should be notarized)
- Letter of Consent (Muvafakatname)
- Any personal letter of the applicant, all documents represented as written (letters, fair invitations, extra docs. Etc.)
- Population Record Sample (Nüfus Kayıt Örneği)
- The applicants are suggested to provide all the required documents at the time of their application for their Visa submission evaluation.
VFS Global has no effect about visa process result and does not advice or suggest to the applicants about their visa result.

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
Travel Medical Insurance
For health reasons, in case of urgent medical assistance or hospitalization, a minimum coverage of EUR 30,000 is required. The insurance must be valid for the entire stay in the Schengen area.

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following specifications:
- Must be an       up-to-date photograph (dated max 6 month old)
- Must be a       color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be       sized between 35 – 45 mm
- Full face       taken straight forward 35       mm from point of the chin to top of hair
- Taken       against a white background
- Without       sunglasses
- Without hat       or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles       should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of       the spectacles may not cover the eyes
For further details with samples click here. (http://www.passbildkriterien.at/oesterreich.html)
            Please note that the Visa application Centre may  not accept photographs that do not meet these specifications. In case photos  are not meeting the requirements mentioned above Submission Officer might ask  to provide updated / recent photos.

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Visa Application Form & Questionnaire
Please fill Visa Application  forms completely and with correct information.
SV_Antrag Short-Term Application Form

Attention  Please:
Visa  application forms need to be filled in with correct information and must be  signed by the applicant himself.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Business visa is only intended to allow a  foreign national to visit Austria for a limited period of time. This category  of visa caters for people wishing visit Austria for work reasons (to sign the  contract, participate in business meeting etc) but does not allow to carry out  the professional activity. 
           
 Applicants will have to provide evidence that  he/she falls under this category.
         
       
         
Austria Visa Application Centers don't apply a regional limitation. Applicants may apply from all our Visa Application 
            Centers in Turkey.
            İstanbul (Beyoğlu andAltunizade),Ankara,İzmir,Bursa,Edirne,Gaziantep,Trabzon,Antalya,Bodrum.
visa_types.full_text:

This category  of visa caters for people wishing visit Austria for work reasons (to sign the  contract, participate in business meeting etc) but does not allow to carry out  the professional activity.

- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tur/en/aut/travel-insurance)

The document list for your cultural   family/friend visit category visa application is provided by Austria Istanbul  General Consulate.

 Applicants  who will apply from Istanbul, has to translate below documents into German or English:

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Visit to Family or Friends visa is only intended to allow a  foreign national to visit Austria for a limited period of time. This category  of visa caters for people wishing visit the member of his/her family or friend. 
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under  this category.
Austria Visa Application Centers don't apply a regional limitation. Applicants may apply from all our Visa Application Centers in Turkey.
-İstanbul,İstanbul (Altunizade and Beyoğlu), Ankara, İzmir,Bursa,Edirne,Gaziantep,Trabzon,Antalya,Bodrum.

Overview
Visa İnformation 
Short term students (  For Example; ERASMUS, AB Support training programs and Research travel  purposes)
C visa ( max. Until 90 days )
D visa ( As of 91 Days, max. Until 180 days) 
Applicants  can make their ERASMUS visa applications at all VFS Global 
                                      visa Application Centres .

- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications
 Must be an up-to-date photograph (dated max 6 month old)
Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
Should be sized between 35 – 45 mm
Full face taken straight forward 35 mm from point of the chin to top of hair
Taken against a white background 
Without sunglasses 
Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons 
Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses 
The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes 
For further details with samples click here.
Please note that the Visa application Centre may not accept photographs that do not meet these 
                                     specifications. In case photos are not meeting the requirements mentioned above Submission Officer 
                                     might ask to provide updated / recent photos.

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Visa Application Form & Questionnaire
Form 1 Schengen Visa and National Visa (D-Visa) (Istanbul) 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR 
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Approved Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Dear Applicant;
The document list for your Approved visa category visa application is provided by Austria Istanbul General Consulate.
Please click for the required documents.
Attention  Please:
- It’s       recommended to provide the necessary documents for faster visa process.
- Please       provide to submit your application documents in German or English       languages.
- It’s not sure       that you will get a visa even if you submit all your applications       documents, only Austria Istanbul General Consulate will be deciding about       the visa process result.
- VFS Global       has no effect about visa process result and does not advice or suggest to       the applicants about their visa result.
visa_types.visa_fees:

Please Note :

- Fees are non-refundable.
- All charges are to be paid in cash only.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
If you have applied for residence permit to Austria General Consulate and if the application has been confirmed as well you need to take an appointment to apply for single entry D visa for taking residence permit card from the relevant authorities in Austria. 
D visa applications are possible in VFS Visa Application Centres.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
If you have applied for residence permit to Austria General Consulate and if the application has been confirmed as well you need to take an appointment to apply for single entry D visa for taking residence permit card from the relevant authorities in Austria. 
D visa applications are possible in VFS Visa Application Centres.

## Visa Fees

[aut > tur > en > Table:Approved Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note : 
- The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change
- Fees are non-refundable.
- All charges are to be paid in cash only.

## Documents Required
Dear Applicant;
The document list for your Approved visa category visa application is provided by Austria Istanbul General Consulate.
Please click for the required documents.

- Please       provide to submit your application documents in German or English       languages.
- It’s not sure       that you will get a visa even if you submit all your applications       documents, only Austria Istanbul General Consulate will be deciding about       the visa process result.

visa_types.name: Short Term
visa_types.overview:
A visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Austria for a limited period of time. The short stay C visas can are be submitted to all Visa Application Centres in Turkey: Istanbul (Altunizade and Beyoğlu), Ankara, Antalya,  Bursa,Edirne, Gaziantep, Izmir, Trabzon.
There is no Jurisdiction for visa Submission, applicants can apply from all Application Centers in Turkey
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. 
Please click on each of the above tab for detail information.
You  can find here the respected article (Art. 43 (4)(b) Visa  Code; Directive 2004/38; harmonized list) declared by EU on list of  supporting documents to be provided by the applicant.
You can find here the respected article (Art. 17(2) Visa Code) declared by EU on Visa Fee and  Service fee amount.
You can find here the respected article (Art. 43(11) Visa Code;  Art. 23 Visa Code; Directive 2004/38) declared  by EU on Processing Time.
You can find here the respected article (Art. 17(4) Visa Code) declared  by EU on Processing Time.

There is no Jurisdiction for visa Submission, applicants can apply from all Application Centers in Turkey
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. 
Please click on each of the above tab for detail information.
You  can find here the respected article (Art. 43 (4)(b) Visa  Code; Directive 2004/38; harmonized list) declared by EU on list of  supporting documents to be provided by the applicant.

You can find here the respected article (Art. 43(11) Visa Code;  Art. 23 Visa Code; Directive 2004/38) declared  by EU on Processing Time.
You can find here the respected article (Art. 17(4) Visa Code) declared  by EU on Processing Time.

visa_types.name: Lorry Driver Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please
click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tur/en/aut/travel-insurance)
Please click on below file to reach required documents checklist:
Lorry Driver Checklist
visa_types.visa_fees:
[aut > tur > en > Table:Tourism > Visa Fees 1]
Attention Please :
- All payments are accepted only in Euro and in cash.
- All payments are non-refundable.
- Except from visa fee, there will be 22.34 Euro service fee charged for each applications.
- Courier is an optional service which will be charged 15 Euro.
- Credit Card is not valid for the payments.
Note:
Change is given back in Turkish Lira even if the fees are cashed in euros (Euros coins are not accepted).
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
